prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第56名，近年排名稳定在50–56名区间，属全国政法类院校最高水平；2024年声誉偏负面（内 蒙古理科法学类投档线暴跌），2026年声誉仍偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度总排名第6（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；法学为A+学科 （全国唯一），是该校核心王牌，对高分考生吸引力极强；金融工程、工商管理等经管类专业亦有较好学科基础。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度2021–2023年为推荐/偏热 ，2024年转为分化观望，整体有所降温；辽宁省2026年物理类考生估算约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平；省控线方面，物理类本科批2025年为367分，与2024年368分基本持平， 难度相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次趋稳、2026年小幅缩招使竞争略有缓解、法学热度降温等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年9180名基础上略有前 移；预测最低位次约8960名，区间8460–9460名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3228 → 4550 → 6892 → 9136 → 9180, with a continuous significant decline from 2021 to 2024, and basically stable from 2024 to 2025 (9136 → 9180), with a baseline of about 9180 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for Physics Category was 27 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 29 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 28 students, a decrease of 1 student from 2025 (a slight reduction of about 3.4%), leading to a slight easing of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 50–56 range in recent years, representing the highest level among national political and legal institutions; reputation was somewhat negative in 2024 (sharp drop in admission scores for law in Inner Mongolia science category), and still somewhat negative in 2026 (campus safety incidents); ranked 6th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and considerable attention from applicants; law is an A+ discipline (the only one nationwide), the core strength of the university, strongly attracting high-scoring students; finance engineering, business administration, and other economics and management majors also have a solid disciplinary foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major from 2021 to 2023 was recommended/slightly hot, but turned to divergence and wait-and-see in 2024, with an overall cooling trend; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province for 2026 is about 143,600, basically the same as in 2025; regarding the provincial control line, the undergraduate batch for Physics Category in 2025 was 367 points, basically the same as 368 points in 2024, indicating relatively stable difficulty.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of rankings from 2024 to 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026 leading to a slight easing of competition, and the cooling of law popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly improve from the 2025 baseline of 9180; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8960, with a range of 8460 to 9460.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 438 → 503 → 673 → 731 → 1011, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 573 positions over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 1011. The enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province from 2021 to 2024 was 33, 33, 33, and 36 students respectively, increasing to 44 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 44, unchanged from 2025, indicating a pause in the expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 56th, with recent rankings stable in the 50–56 range, representing the highest level among national political science and law institutions. In 2024, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to a sharp drop in the admission score for law in Inner Mongolia's science category), and in 2026, its reputation remains somewhat negative (due to a campus safety incident). On Douyin, it ranks 6th in overall popularity (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, attracting considerable attention from applicants. Law is an A+ discipline (the only one in the country) and is the core strength of the university, strongly appealing to high-scoring students. Political science, Marxist theory, and related disciplines also have strong capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major was recommended/relatively hot from 2021 to 2023, but turned to divergence and wait-and-see in 2024, with an overall cooling trend. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Liaoning Province is about 56,400, roughly the same as in 2025. Regarding the provincial control line, the History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 437 points, a significant increase from 400 points in 2024, reflecting intensified overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the increase in the provincial control line reflecting intensified competition, and the cooling of law major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 1011. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1041, with a range of 854–1228.
